title: Set up health workflow project tracker
summary: Bootstrap the health project scaffold so future health workflow tasks can be tracked under a registered project.
acceptance_criteria: projects/health/project.json records the active health workflow project.
projects/health/tasks/index.json exists and can list future health tasks.
Repository workflow-state validation passes for the scaffolded project.

context_snapshot.summary: Health project scaffold created from setup-workflow-project after native Codex planning found no existing health project.

session_log.note: Created during project setup after native Codex planning discovered that projects/health did not exist.
Linked health-002 so the bootstrap tracker-maintenance task accounts for the first workflow-change task file.
Completed after the health project scaffold and registry registration were validated and pushed to GitHub in commit 9f966aa.
